general.languageDesc: Select display language / 选择显示语言
general.autostartDesc: Run this GUI to apply wallpapers in the background on system startup.
general.dynamicThemeDesc: Adapt application colors to match the currently selected wallpaper.
general.dynamicSidebarThemeDesc: Apply wallpaper colors locally to the sidebar directly.
general.transparentUiDesc: Make the window background transparent (requires restart).
general.uiTransparencyDesc: Adjust the opacity of the application.
general.fpsLimitDesc: Target frames per second for animations.
general.scalingModeDesc: How the wallpaper fits the screen.
general.protonStopDesc: Stop all wallpapers when a game is running under Proton.
general.noFullscreenPauseDesc: Keep running when other apps are fullscreen.
general.disableParticlesDesc: Turn off particle effects to save resources.
general.scrollMaskDesc: Enable smooth fade effect at the top and bottom of scroll areas. (Note: May impact performance on some systems)

audio.noAutomuteDesc: Prevent automatic muting when not in focus.

advanced.useNativeWaylandDesc: Run the GUI with native Wayland support (requires restart).
advanced.customCommandArgsDesc: Pass raw arguments to the backend.
advanced.restartConfirm: Changing Wayland support requires a restart. Do you want to restart now?
advanced.wallpaperChangeCommandDesc: Shell command to execute when a wallpaper is applied.

hooks.previewPathDesc: Absolute path to the wallpaper's preview image.
hooks.videoPathDesc: Absolute path to the main media file (video/html).
hooks.isVideoDesc: Boolean indicating if wallpaper is video.
hooks.wallpaperTitleDesc: Display name or title of the wallpaper.
hooks.wallpaperTypeDesc: Type of the wallpaper (video, web, scene).

executable.binaryLocationDesc: Set the path to your linux-wallpaperengine binary. Leave empty to use system PATH.
executable.wallpaperEngineDirDesc: Main folder where Wallpaper Engine is installed (steamapps/common/wallpaper_engine).
executable.workshopDirDesc: Path to your Steam Workshop content (431960). Usually auto-detected from the Wallpaper Engine Directory above.
executable.steamSearchPathsDesc: Additional directories to search for Steam workshop content.
executable.noWeDirFound: No Wallpaper Engine directory found in search paths.
executable.noWorkshopDirFound: No workshop directory found in search paths.
